scripts.install-app: npm install --workspaces=false && npm install --w=apps/web-and-backend && npm install --w=apps/mobile
scripts.test:mobile: node scripts/test-server/startTestServer.js && sleep 3 && npm run test --workspace=apps/mobile && node scripts/test-server/stopTestServer.js
scripts.test:watch:mobile: node scripts/test-server/startTestServer.js && sleep 3 && npm run test:watch --workspace=apps/mobile && node scripts/test-server/stopTestServer.js
